memberdef.argsstring: (const Eref &e, unsigned int bindIndex, unsigned int size)
memberdef.name: addToSendBuf

briefdescription.para: Returns pointer to Send buffer for filling in arguments.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Eref &e, unsigned int opIndex, unsigned int size, unsigned int hopType)
memberdef.name: addToSetBuf

briefdescription.para: Returns pointer to Set buffer for filling in arguments.
All arrived messages and set calls are handled and cleared.
Clears arrived set and get calls.
Sends off contets of Set buffer.
Checks that all sends have gone out.

detaileddescription.para: Finalize all outgoing messages, clear the sendSize vector so that we can handle another round of messages.

briefdescription.para: Handles 'get' calls from another node, to an object on mynode.

detaileddescription.para: PostMaster class: handles cross-node messaging using MPI. Identical to the Process call: sends out what needs to go, and then waits for any incoming messages and passes them on.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Eref &e, unsigned int bindIndex, vector< double > &getRecvBuf)
memberdef.name: remoteFieldGetVec

briefdescription.para: This is a blocking call. However, it must still handle other.
Blocking call to get a value from a remote node.

detaileddescription.para: This is a blocking call. However, it must not block other requests.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Eref &e, unsigned int bindIndex, vector< vector< double > > &getRecvBuf, vector< unsigned int > &size)
memberdef.name: remoteGetVec

briefdescription.para: This is a blocking call. However, it must still handle other.
